# Telepathine.ai

> The portable memory layer for AI agents. One memory, every engine. Any agent.

## What it does

Telepathine.ai gives AI coding agents persistent memory across sessions. Agents capture observations (decisions, changes, learnings), search them with hybrid full-text + semantic search, and inject relevant context into future sessions — automatically.

## Key capabilities

- **Persistent Observations**: Structured memory with type, title, narrative, facts, concepts
- **Hybrid Search**: Full-text + semantic vector similarity in one query
- **Context Injection**: Progressive disclosure — formatted, compressed context at session start
- **Morpheus Pipeline**: Normalize, deduplicate, supersede, decay, consolidate, summarize
- **Session Lifecycle**: Start → observe → summarize → complete
- **Signal Bus**: Agent-to-agent communication via structured message broadcasting
- **MCP Server**: 16 tools via Model Context Protocol (JSON-RPC 2.0)
- **Multi-tenant Isolation**: Row-level security, project-scoped, API key isolation

## Integration paths

- REST API: `https://api.telepathine.ai`
- MCP Server: `npx -y @ai-memory/mcp-server`
- TypeScript SDK: `@ai-memory/sdk`
- Python SDK: `agent-memory`

## Connectors

Claude Code, Cursor, Gemini CLI, Windsurf, Copilot, Pi, Hermes, Aider, and more. All connectors share the same project-scoped memory.

## Pricing

- Spark: Free — 10K observations/mo
- Ignite: $29/mo — 100K observations, Signal Bus, team sharing
- Blaze: $99/mo — 1M observations, priority support, audit logs
- Enterprise: Custom — unlimited, SSO/SAML, on-prem

## Self-hostable

Apache 2.0 license. Run on your own infrastructure.

- /features — Complete feature overview

- /connectors — Platform adapters
